description: The 16th Qods Division of Gilan is a regional IRGC ground forces division based in Gilan Province, northern Iran. It was commanded by [Ali Abdollahi Aliabadi](/people/ali-abdollahi-aliabadi) and is representative of the IRGC's provincial command structure established during and after the [Iran–Iraq War](/events/iran-iraq-war).
editorial_notes: Regional IRGC division, Gilan Province. Commanded by Ali Abdollahi Aliabadi (in DB).
